title: R@phiydiym #7508
definition:
Rephidim = "rests" or "stays" or "resting places"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness between Egypt and Sinai
nasbUsage:
Definition: Rephidim = "rests" or "stays" or "resting places"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness between Egypt and Sinai

    NASB:  a place in the desert
